title: Parting At Morning
content:
Round the cape of a sudden came the sea,
    And the sun looked over the mountain�s rim
    And straight was a path of gold for him,
    And the need of a world of men for me.
meaning:
Robert Browning's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Parting At Morning"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
